task_completion.description: Verify that a Synthetic session is currently running in the OpenBCI GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI is open and the system status or header indicates that a 'Synthetic' session is active (e.g., 'Synthetic' data source selected or streaming).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Spectrogram widget is open and visible in the GUI layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One of the visible widget panels in the OpenBCI GUI is titled 'Spectrogram'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Channel Selector settings pane for the Spectrogram widget is left open and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings dropdown or channel selection interface specifically belonging to the Spectrogram widget is open and clearly visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Top Plot is configured to display ONLY Channel 1 and Channel 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Spectrogram's Channel Selector pane, under the 'Top Plot' section, the buttons or checkboxes for Channel 1 and Channel 2 are selected/highlighted, while all other channels (e.g., 3-8 or 3-16) are deselected/unhighlighted.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Bottom Plot is configured to display ONLY Channel 7 and Channel 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Spectrogram's Channel Selector pane, under the 'Bottom Plot' section, the buttons or checkboxes for Channel 7 and Channel 8 are selected/highlighted, while all other channels (e.g., 1-6) are deselected/unhighlighted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine OpenBCI GUI interface with its standard layout, buttons, and graphs, rather than a terminal window, text editor, or script output.

integrity.description: Verify the channel settings pane is genuinely part of the OpenBCI GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Channel Selector pane is visually integrated into the OpenBCI GUI (matching its dark/light theme and UI components) and is not a mock-up or a separate text document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply open an image of the completed task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows a live desktop environment with the OpenBCI application running, not an image viewer (like Preview or Photos) displaying a pre-configured screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the 'Spectrogram' widget in the OpenBCI GUI during a Synthetic session. The target configuration for the Top Plot is exactly channels [1, 2] enabled and all others disabled. The target configuration for the Bottom Plot is exactly channels [7, 8] enabled and all others disabled. The Channel Selector settings pane must remain visible on the screen for verification.
